+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "spire-1975-rfc-registrations-rbac",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "spire: [RFC] Registrations RBAC",
+    "description": "[RFC] Registrations RBAC. Requested by 3+ users.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current spire deployment",
+        "description": "Verify your spire version and configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n spire -l app.kubernetes.io/name=spire\nhelm list -n spire 2>/dev/null || echo \"Not installed via Helm\"\n```\nThis feature requires a working spire installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review spire configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant spire configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n spire -l app.kubernetes.io/name=spire\nkubectl get configmap -n spire -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=spire\n```\n**Background:**\nSPIRE implements the concept of “admin” workloads. A workload presenting an admin SVID is able to act broadly across the entire registration API."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for [RFC] Registrations RBAC",
+        "description": "This PR adds a field to the middleware `Preprocess` function allowing passing of the request object for Unary gRPC calls. This will allow future enhancement to make more granular actions for `Preprocess` functions, i.e. for authorization to have finer grained policies (#1975) based on the body of\n```yaml\nActor​ ​:​ ​Role, \nRole​ ​:​ ​[{\n              Actions: ​[], \n              Resources: ​[], \n              Namespaces: ​[],\n​         }, \n         {\n              Actions: ​[], \n              Resources: ​[], \n              Namespaces: ​[],\n​         }, \n​}]\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n spire -l app.kubernetes.io/name=spire\nkubectl get events -n spire --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm the feature described in \"[RFC] Registrations RBAC\" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "This PR adds a field to the middleware `Preprocess` function allowing passing of the request object for Unary gRPC calls. This will allow future enhancement to make more granular actions for `Preprocess` functions, i.e. for authorization to have finer grained policies (#1975) based on the body of the request.\n\nAdd the `req interface{}` field for `middleware.Preprocess`.",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "Actor​ ​:​ ​Role, \nRole​ ​:​ ​[{\n              Actions: ​[], \n              Resources: ​[], \n              Namespaces: ​[],\n​         }, \n         {\n              Actions: ​[], \n              Resources: ​[], \n              Namespaces: ​[],\n​         }, \n​}]",
+        "spiffe:​//example.ca/foo/workload:​ ​foobarRegistrant, \nfoobarRegistrant: ​[​ ​{\n   Actions: ​[\"CREATE\",​ ​\"UPDATE\",​ ​\"DELETE\"]\n   Resources: ​[“REGISTREATIONS”],\n   Namespaces: ​[\"spiffe://example.ca/foo\",​ ​\"spiffe://example.ca/bar\"]\n}]",
+        "input := policy.Input{\n\t\tCaller:     spiffeID,\n\t\tFullMethod: fullMethod,\n\t\tReq:        req,\n\t\tAdmin:      isAdmin,\n\t\tLocal:      isLocal,\n\t\tDownstream: isDownstream,\n\t\tAgent:      isAgentCaller,\n\t}"
+      ]
+    }
+  },
